scripts.package: docker build . -t cte-linux-amd64 --platform linux/amd64 --no-cache && docker save -o cte-linux-amd64.tar cte-linux-amd64
scripts.containerised: npm run build && npm run compose
scripts.installs: npm install && npm run install-auth && npm run install-admin && npm run install-enforcement && npm run install-driver && npm run install-adminService && npm run install-marketing && npm run install-vehicleService && npm run install-ticketService && npm run install-permitService && npm run install-helloworld && npm run install-campusPolice && npm run install-payroll && npm run install-registrar && npm run install-paymentService
scripts.cis: npm ci && npm run ci-auth && npm run ci-adminService && npm run ci-ticketService && npm run ci-vehicleService && npm run ci-permitService && npm run ci-admin && npm run ci-enforcement && npm run ci-driver && npm run ci-marketing && npm run ci-helloworld && npm run ci-campusPolice && npm run ci-payroll && npm run ci-registrar && npm run ci-paymentService
scripts.build: npm run build-auth && npm run build-admin && npm run build-enforcement && npm run build-driver && npm run build-marketing && npm run build-adminService && npm run build-vehicleService && npm run build-ticketService && npm run build-permitService && npm run build-helloworld && npm run build-campusPolice && npm run build-payroll && npm run build-registrar && npm run build-paymentService
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-adminService" "npm run start-vehicleService" "npm run start-ticketService" "npm run start-paymentService" "npm run start-permitService" "npm run start-campusPolice" "npm run start-payroll" "npm run start-registrar" "npm run start-admin" "npm run start-enforcement" "npm run start-driver" "npm run start-marketing" "npm run start-helloworld"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev-auth" "npm run dev-adminService" "npm run dev-vehicleService" "npm run dev-ticketService" "npm run dev-paymentService" "npm run dev-permitService" "npm run dev-campusPolice" "npm run dev-payroll" "npm run dev-registrar" "npm run dev-admin" "npm run dev-enforcement" "npm run dev-driver" "npm run dev-marketing" "npm run dev-helloworld"
scripts.lint: npm run lint-auth && npm run lint-admin && npm run lint-enforcement && npm run lint-driver && npm run lint-marketing && npm run lint-adminService && npm run lint-vehicleService && npm run lint-ticketService && npm run lint-permitService && npm run lint-campusPolice && npm run lint-payroll && npm run lint-registrar && npm run lint-paymentService
scripts.test: npm run test-driver && npm run test-admin && npm run test-ticketService && npm run test-marketing
